title: PVP | Totem Mace guy 3D
description: Dear horned demon, you're with a mace
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/81fc8d49af50dd384bcd558e41042500cb38ccb9_0.webp)
# Information
> Changes the totem to your skin! A cute little demon with a mace on your hands. 
> You can install any skin. You just need to open the file in the editor and change it to your own.
# 

## A way to install your skin! Please read it
>   To do this, you need your png skin with the name totem_of_undying.png 
>   Open the resource package and follow the path to file: 
> ```
> assets\minecraft\textures\item\totem_of_undying.png
> ```
> Open this image in the editor and change the image from the resource pack to yours!  

![Example of a change](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9bdccfcdf9e7ac49c68cc93472b0b5e229d8fb5c.png)

#

> ![Totem in game Skin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2ae32d983eded1ccbfb11a44644635590a6fb779.png)
